message:
test(config+process): B11 wave 2 invariant tests for config validation and process

config.rs: +7 tests (invalid_symbol_size, invalid_max_block_size,
invalid_parallelism_encoding, insufficient_memory, timeout_too_short,
config_error_display, covering all ConfigError validation branches)
process.rs: +4 tests (test_command_args, test_command_envs,
test_command_output, test_process_error_display)
runtime/config.rs: +3 tests (obligation_leak_response_variants,
leak_escalation_preserves_nonzero, default_governor_settings)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
